overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character holding a torch exploring a ruined Celtic-style village during a stormy blue hour. The environment features decaying wooden structures, stone ruins, and muddy terrain with atmospheric fog and overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow muddy path between wooden shelters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy village path holding a lit torch

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden structure with tattered fabric roofing
stone fortification with towers visible on the hillside
flickering fire held by the character casting dynamic light
wet uneven terrain with puddles reflecting the torchlight

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a narrow muddy path in a ruined village, holding a torch that illuminates the immediate surroundings. A wooden shelter stands on the left while a distant fortress wall is visible on the hillside ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ruined village center with distant lit longhouse

events.description: path widens revealing open village area with distant structures showing warm light

agents.ego_description: continuing through the village center toward the distant lit structures

entered.detail: large wooden structure with warm orange glow from within
collapsed traditional buildings with broken roofs
scattered rocks and debris from destroyed structures

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider village area with the fortress wall now closer on the left. A distant longhouse glows with warm light ahead, while ruined wooden huts line the right side of the muddy path.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined stone wall with archway breach

events.description: character turns right to approach and examine the ruined stone wall up close

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone ruin and examining the archway breach in the wall

entered.detail: weathered stone wall with large archway opening and broken top
rough wooden pole structure supporting tattered fabric

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward a prominent ruined stone wall with an archway, moving closer to examine the structure. Wooden scaffolding stands to the right while the fortress wall looms large on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ruined settlement with scattered debris

events.description: character turns left away from the stone wall to continue through the open ruins

agents.ego_description: turning away from the stone wall and proceeding forward through the open ruined village

entered.detail: large rocks and broken wooden beams strewn across the ground
cluster of destroyed traditional buildings with collapsed roofs

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the stone wall, the character moves through an open area filled with scattered rubble and ruined buildings. The fortress wall recedes into the distance on the left as the exploration continues through the devastated settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a ruined Celtic village, moving from a narrow muddy trail toward the expansive debris of a devastated settlement. It begins with the character navigating a tight path illuminated by a torch, passing a wooden shelter while a distant fortress wall looms on the hillside. As the path opens into a wider village area, the fortress wall draws closer on the left and ruined huts line the right, leading the eye toward a distant longhouse glowing with warm light. The camera then shifts focus toward a prominent ruined stone archway and nearby wooden scaffolding before turning away to traverse an open expanse of scattered rubble. Finally, the scene expands across the wreckage of the settlement as the fortress wall recedes into the distance.
